description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a slatted seat and backrest constructed from dark metal and wooden slats. The seat is supported by a robust black metal frame, with the wooden slats providing both seating and armrest surfaces at each end. The backrest is a single horizontal metal bar, offering minimal but functional support. The bench is mounted on a rectangular concrete or stone base, suggesting stability and permanence. The design is open and linear, with gaps between the slats for drainage and airflow. Its aesthetic and materials are well-suited for public parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas.
description: A modern outdoor bench with a black metal frame, wooden slats for seating and armrests, and a minimal metal backrest, mounted on a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, the slatted seat, wooden armrests, and the horizontal metal backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden slats, the depth of the seat, and the single metal backrest bar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest bar and the open slatted structure of the seat, with armrests visible at both ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bench and the arrangement of the slats.
attribute_leg_design: two wide black metal supports integrated with the frame
